headline: ChatGPT health features launch amid data security and liability concerns
body: OpenAI launched Health in ChatGPT while simultaneously facing scrutiny over data portability, security vulnerabilities, and clinical safety. A lawsuit claims ChatGPT provided dangerous health advice contributing to a patient crisis, and security researchers demonstrated how malicious agents could infiltrate enterprise accounts through a single link. For healthcare organizations considering LLM adoption, this moment clarifies the stakes: vendor lock-in risks, potential liability exposure from AI-generated medical guidance, and the critical need for data governance protocols before deploying these tools in clinical workflows.
